arts.ttl: Middlesbrough man and former Arsenal defender return for Portsmouth against Bristol City
arts.sum: John Mousinho has named an unchanged starting XI against Bristol City today.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Bristol City LIVE: Updates, build-up and team news from a blustery Fratton Park
arts.sum: Good afternoon from a blustery Fratton Park as Pompey take on Bristol City

arts.ttl: Nahki Wells on Bristol City surprise, relationships with fellow strikers and Liam Manning impact
arts.sum: Heading into this season, very few Bristol City supporters would have been expecting Nahki Wells to be the Robins' primary goal threat, particularly after the forward played second fiddle to Tommy Conway for much of last term. Manning himself has previously revealed that the 34-year-old is working alongside Armstrong and Mayulu to improve areas of his game as the two young forwards look to find their feet in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Bristol City predicted team vs Portsmouth as Liam Manning faces new Marcus McGuane dilemma
arts.sum: While it could be argued City found their feet at the wrong time with a week between fixtures, the beauty of the busy festive period in the Championship is that Manning's side face another three games over the next seven days to build on their win over the Pilgrims. With McGuane now fit and available to return to the starting line-up, the City boss has to decide whether he or Max Bird partners Jason Knight at the base of midfield.

arts.ttl: Bombshell West Brom exit mooted as ex-Portsmouth and Leeds United man agrees deal with League One side
arts.sum: A round-up of key Championship headlines as a former Portsmouth star prepares for a new start

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Bristol City game on - as things stand
arts.sum: Pompey’s Championship fixture against Bristol City will go ahead as planned - as things stand.

arts.ttl: 'Why on earth? World hates us' - Portsmouth faithful register their horror after Wycombe FA Cup draw decision is made
arts.sum: Pompey fans on social media have been left bemused by the decision to move the Blues’ FA Cup third-round game against Wycombe Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth and Bristol City fans wait for updates as Storm Darragh hits UK
arts.sum: Pompey and Bristol City fans are waking up this morning wondering whether today’s game at Fratton Park will actually go ahead.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss provides update on forgotten ex-Burnley and Peterborough figure as first-team absence continues
arts.sum: John Mousinho has revealed Will Norris is available for Pompey selection.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Bristol City injury news as 12 out for EFL Championship clash
arts.sum: Pompey are at home to Bristol City at Fratton Park today.
